title: OVERNIGHT SHELTER - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION OVERNIGHT SHELTER OVERNIGHT SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an overnight emergency shelter. Dinner, breakfast, showers, laundry, and resource assistance will be provided to those staying at the shelter. Unaccompanied minors may be eligible for services with the permission of a guardian or law enforcement agency. 1315 NE Macy Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and families with children. Guests may not use illegal drugs or alcohol during their stay. Animals are allowed. Hours: April-November Tuesday/Thursday 8pm-8am December-March 7 days per week 8pm-8am Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-9766 Intake Main phone (503) 472-9766 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
